name: API5
comments: Patients were discharged from the clinical facility on day 4

name: DIALYSIS_POST
comments: period 1: On day 1 of period 1, a 5-mg oral dose was administered, followed 2 hours later by a 4-hour hemodialysis session (on hemodialysis period).

name: DIALYSIS_PRE
comments: period 2: On day 1 of period 2, subjects were administered a second 5-mg oral dose of apixaban immediately following a 4-hour hemodialysis session, with the next session not performed until completion of the 72-hour time point sample
